product_overview: Sharetopus is a SaaS multi-platform social publishing tool that lets creators compose, customize, schedule, and publish posts to LinkedIn, TikTok, Pinterest, and Instagram from a single interface. The app includes social account management, subscription billing via Stripe, media uploads to Supabase, and scheduled publish processing via QStash.
core_goals: Enable creators to compose and publish or schedule posts to multiple social platforms from one unified UI
Provide secure OAuth-based social account connections with plan-based account limits
Support media uploads (images/videos) with validation and Supabase storage signed URLs
Gate content creation and account connections behind Stripe subscription billing
Allow users to manage scheduled posts (reschedule, cancel, resume, delete) and view published content history

features.name: Landing Page & Marketing
features.description: Public marketing site with hero, feature highlights, testimonials, and pricing section including monthly/yearly toggle and CTA that begins subscription or signup flow.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> See hero section with app description -> Scroll through feature highlights and testimonials -> Scroll to pricing section (#pricing) to view plans -> Toggle between monthly and yearly pricing -> Click Start Now CTA (navigates to /create)
Navigate to / -> Click Start Now CTA (navigates to /create) -> If unauthenticated, see Clerk sign-in modal -> Cancel sign-in modal -> Remain on / (no redirect)

Navigate to / -> Scroll to pricing section (#pricing) to view plans -> Click plan button to start Stripe Checkout (external) -> Redirect to Stripe Checkout (external) -> Cancel checkout or close window -> Remain on / (checkout not completed)
Navigate to / -> Click Privacy Policy link -> Navigate to /PrivacyPolicy -> See Privacy Policy static content
Navigate to / -> Click Terms of Service link -> Navigate to /tos -> See Terms of Service static content

features.name: Authentication via Clerk
features.description: Authentication is managed by Clerk: accessing any protected route triggers Clerk's hosted sign-in/sign-up UI; user data is synced via Clerk webhooks and ensureUserExists().
user_flows: Navigate to /create -> See Clerk sign-in modal (hosted UI) -> Sign up with email or OAuth provider -> Complete sign-up -> Redirect back to /create

Navigate to /create -> See Clerk sign-in modal (hosted UI) -> Sign in with existing credentials -> Complete sign-in -> Redirect back to /create -> Backend runs ensureUserExists() to sync user to Supabase
Navigate to /create -> See Clerk sign-in modal (hosted UI) -> Attempt sign in with incorrect password -> See authentication error from Clerk
Navigate to any protected route when authenticated -> Access granted to route content -> ensureUserExists() runs in layout

features.name: Multi-Platform Post Creation
features.description: Create Text, Image, or Video posts with per-platform customization, media upload to Supabase, and options to Post Now or Schedule for Later.
user_flows: Navigate to /create -> Click Text Post card (navigates to /create/text) -> Select one or more connected LinkedIn accounts -> Write post description within 3000 character limit -> Choose Post Now -> Click Post -> See success toast notification

Navigate to /create -> Click Image Post card (navigates to /create/image) -> Select one or more connected accounts (LinkedIn, Pinterest, TikTok, Instagram) -> Upload JPEG/PNG image under 8MB -> Fill title and caption -> Choose Schedule -> Pick date (min tomorrow) -> Pick time -> Click Schedule -> See success toast notification

Navigate to /create -> Click Video Post card (navigates to /create/video) -> Select one or more connected accounts -> Upload MP4/MOV video under 250MB -> Select cover thumbnail via timestamp -> Fill title and caption -> Choose Post Now -> Click Post -> See success toast notification

Navigate to /create -> Click Image Post card (navigates to /create/image) -> Attempt to upload image larger than 8MB or unsupported format -> See file validation error -> Replace file with valid image -> Continue
Navigate to /create -> Click Text Post card (navigates to /create/text) -> Try to submit without selecting any connected account -> See form validation error indicating at least one account required

features.name: Social Account Connections
features.description: Manage connected social accounts via OAuth flows with enforcement of plan-based account limits and disconnect capability.
user_flows: Navigate to /connections -> View connected accounts per platform and count vs plan limit -> Click Connect button for TikTok -> App calls POST /api/social/tiktok/initiate -> OAuth popup opens -> Authorize app in platform OAuth popup -> Complete OAuth flow -> See new account appear on /connections
Navigate to /connections -> Click Connect button for Pinterest -> App calls POST /api/social/pinterest/initiate -> Authorize app -> Complete flow -> See new Pinterest account appear
Navigate to /connections -> Click connected account avatar -> Click disconnect -> Confirm disconnect in dialog -> See account removed from list
Navigate to /connections when account limit reached -> Click Connect button -> See ConnectionLimitModal with upgrade CTA -> Click upgrade CTA -> Initiate billing flow
Navigate to /connections -> Attempt to connect Instagram via UI -> See Instagram connect button disabled/missing (UI disabled) -> Use backend routes or re-check UI later

features.name: Scheduled Post Management
features.description: View scheduled post batches grouped by date and perform reschedule, cancel, resume, and delete operations on batches.
user_flows: Navigate to /scheduled -> See scheduled post batches grouped by date with status badges and platform icons -> Click a batch to open actions menu -> Click Reschedule -> Pick new date (min tomorrow) and time -> Confirm -> See updated scheduled date on /scheduled
Navigate to /scheduled -> Click a batch -> Click Cancel -> Confirm -> See batch status change to cancelled badge
Navigate to /scheduled -> Click a cancelled batch -> Click Resume -> Confirm -> See batch status change to scheduled
Navigate to /scheduled -> Click a batch -> Click Delete -> Confirm deletion in dialog -> See batch removed from list
Navigate to /scheduled -> Click Reschedule -> Pick a past date -> See validation error indicating date must be in the future (min tomorrow)

features.name: Posted Content History
features.description: Browse published content history grouped by batch and inspect per-platform post status including external View post links.
user_flows: Navigate to /posted -> See published content batches grouped by date with platform avatars -> Click a batch -> See per-platform post details and status for each platform -> Click View post link to open the published post on the platform (external)
Navigate to /posted -> See a batch with a platform status of Failed -> Click the batch -> See error_message and failure details displayed in the batch details dialog
Navigate to /posted -> Click a batch -> Close details dialog -> Remain on /posted

features.name: Stripe Subscription Billing
features.description: Subscription checkout via Stripe Checkout and in-app access to the Stripe Customer Portal for billing management; pricing presented on landing page with monthly/yearly toggle.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Scroll to pricing section (#pricing) -> Toggle between monthly and yearly billing -> Click plan button -> If unauthenticated, see Clerk sign-in modal -> After authentication, click plan button -> App creates Stripe Checkout session -> Redirect to Stripe Checkout (external) -> Complete payment -> Redirect to /payment/success with confetti animation -> Click Continue -> Navigate to /create
Navigate to / -> Scroll to pricing section (#pricing) -> Click plan button -> Redirect to Stripe Checkout (external) -> Cancel checkout or close window -> Remain on / (no subscription created)

While authenticated in-app -> Open user avatar dropdown from sidebar -> Click Billing -> App opens Stripe Customer Portal (external) -> Manage subscription in portal -> Return to /create via return URL
While authenticated in-app -> Rapidly click Billing multiple times -> See RateLimitError with countdown if rate limit exceeded

features.name: User Profile Settings
features.description: Clerk-powered user profile management for editing profile details, changing password/email, and managing connected OAuth providers.
user_flows: Navigate to /userProfile -> See Clerk UserProfile component with account settings -> Edit profile fields (name, email) -> Save changes -> See confirmation from Clerk UI
Navigate to /userProfile -> Go to password change section -> Enter current and new password -> Submit -> See success confirmation
Navigate to /userProfile -> Attempt to change password with incorrect current password -> See validation/error message from Clerk

features.name: Sidebar Navigation
features.description: Persistent app sidebar linking to protected routes, user dropdown with billing and account actions, and quick access to create/connection/scheduled/posted/studio pages.
user_flows: Navigate to /create -> From sidebar click Connections link -> Navigate to /connections -> From sidebar click Scheduled link -> Navigate to /scheduled -> From sidebar click Posted link -> Navigate to /posted -> From sidebar click Studio link -> Navigate to /studio -> See Coming Soon placeholder
Navigate to /create -> Click user avatar in sidebar footer -> Open user dropdown -> Click Account -> Navigate to /userProfile
Navigate to /create -> Click user avatar in sidebar footer -> Open user dropdown -> Click Billing -> App opens Stripe Customer Portal (external) -> If rate limit reached, see RateLimitError component

routes.description: Marketing landing page with hero, features, testimonials, pricing section (#pricing), and CTAs
Post type selection hub with cards for Text, Image, and Video posts
Text post creation form for LinkedIn with account selection and scheduling
Image post creation form for LinkedIn, Pinterest, TikTok, Instagram with media upload
Video post creation form with upload, thumbnail selector, and multi-platform support
Social account connection manager with OAuth flows for TikTok, Pinterest, LinkedIn
View and manage scheduled posts with reschedule, cancel, resume, and delete actions
Published content history grouped by batch with per-platform status and external links
Clerk UserProfile component for account settings, password, and OAuth management
Post-checkout success page with confetti animation and Continue button to /create

features.name: Landing Page & Marketing
features.description: Public landing page with hero section, feature highlights, testimonials, stats, alternatives comparison, and pricing section with monthly/yearly toggle
user_interactions: View hero section with app description
Scroll through feature highlights and testimonials
Scroll to pricing section (#pricing) to view plans
Toggle between monthly and yearly pricing
Click Start Now CTA button which navigates to /create (triggers Clerk auth if not signed in)
Click Privacy Policy and Terms of Service links in footer

features.name: Authentication via Clerk
features.description: User authentication handled entirely by Clerk with modal/redirect UI. No custom login page exists. Accessing any protected route triggers Clerk sign-in.
user_interactions: Access any protected route to trigger Clerk sign-in modal
Sign up with email or OAuth providers
Sign in with existing credentials
Clerk webhook syncs user data to Supabase on create/update/delete

features.name: Multi-Platform Post Creation
features.description: Create text, image, or video posts for multiple social platforms from a unified interface with per-platform customization
user_interactions: Navigate to /create and select post type (Text, Image, or Video)
Select one or more connected social accounts
Upload media file (image or video) if applicable
Write post description with 3000 character limit
Customize content per platform (title, description, alt text)
Set platform-specific options (TikTok privacy, Pinterest board, LinkedIn visibility)
Choose Post Now or Schedule for Later
If scheduling, pick date (min tomorrow) and time
See success toast notification on completion

features.name: Social Account Connections
features.description: Connect and manage social media accounts via OAuth with plan-based account limits
user_interactions: Navigate to /connections
View connected accounts per platform with count vs plan limit
Click Connect button for a platform to initiate OAuth flow
Authorize app in platform OAuth popup
See new account appear after successful connection
Click account avatar badge to disconnect with confirmation dialog
See ConnectionLimitModal if account limit reached with upgrade CTA

features.name: Scheduled Post Management
features.description: View, reschedule, cancel, resume, and delete scheduled posts grouped by batch
user_interactions: Navigate to /scheduled to view all scheduled post batches
See batches grouped by date with status badges and platform icons
Click reschedule to pick new date and time
Click cancel to mark batch as cancelled
Click resume to reactivate a cancelled batch
Click delete with confirmation dialog to permanently remove

features.name: Posted Content History
features.description: View published content history grouped by batch with per-platform status and external post links
user_interactions: Navigate to /posted to view all published content
See batches grouped by date with platform avatars
Click a batch to view per-platform post details
See post status per platform (Posted, Failed, In Progress)
Click View post link to open published post on the platform

features.name: Stripe Subscription Billing
features.description: Subscription management with 3 tiers (Starter, Creator, Pro), Stripe Checkout, and Customer Portal
user_interactions: View pricing plans on landing page (#pricing section)
Toggle between monthly and yearly billing
Click plan button to start Stripe Checkout (authenticates first if needed)
Complete payment on Stripe hosted checkout page
Redirect to /payment/success with confetti animation
Access billing via sidebar user dropdown to open Stripe Customer Portal

features.name: User Profile Settings
features.description: Clerk-powered user profile management for account settings, password changes, and connected OAuth accounts
user_interactions: Navigate to /userProfile from sidebar
View and edit profile information
Change password or email
Manage connected OAuth providers

features.name: Sidebar Navigation
features.description: Main app navigation sidebar with links to all protected routes and user menu with billing access
user_interactions: Click Create link to navigate to /create
Click Connections link to navigate to /connections
Click Scheduled link to navigate to /scheduled
Click Posted link to navigate to /posted
Click Studio link to navigate to /studio
Click user avatar to open dropdown menu
Click Billing in dropdown to open Stripe Customer Portal
Click Account in dropdown to navigate to /userProfile

known_limitations.issue: Instagram connection UI is commented out but backend OAuth and posting are fully implemented
known_limitations.impact: Users cannot connect Instagram accounts through the UI

known_limitations.issue: Studio analytics page shows Coming Soon placeholder with no functionality
known_limitations.impact: No analytics data is displayed to users

known_limitations.issue: There is no /login route - authentication is handled by Clerk modal/redirect on protected route access
known_limitations.impact: Tests should not navigate to /login directly; instead access a protected route to trigger auth

known_limitations.issue: Pricing is not a separate page but a section on the landing page at
After login users land on /create not /dashboard
known_limitations.impact: Tests should expect /create as the post-auth landing page

known_limitations.issue: Twitter/X and Facebook have stub data but are not fully implemented
known_limitations.impact: These platforms are not functional for posting or connecting

known_limitations.issue: Published posts cannot be edited, only cancelled or deleted
known_limitations.impact: No edit functionality exists for published content
